interface.shortDescription: Explore, generate, export, and do more with Sketch designs.
interface.longDescription: Integrate Sketch with your workflows. Includes the Sketch MCP server and skills to explore and organize documents, generate code from designs, create designs from code, and more.
defaultPrompt: Export all icons in my Sketch design as SVGs
Fill placeholders in my Sketch design with realistic data
Implement my Sketch design in React
